'''Jason Flowers''' (born 30 January 1975), also known by the [[nickname]] of '''"[[Cauliflower|Collie]]"''',  is a professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s, and has [[Coach (sports)|coach]]ed in the 2010s. He played at representative level for [[Scotland national rugby league team|Scotland]], and at club level for [[Redhill A.R.L.F.C.|Redhill]] [[Redhill ARLFC|ARLFC]] (in [[Airedale, Castleford|Airedale]], [[Castleford]]), the [[Castleford Tigers|Castleford]] (Tigers), [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]] and the [[Salford Red Devils|Salford City Reds]], primarily as a {{rlp|fb}}, but also at {{rlp|wg|ce}} or {{rlp|sr}},<ref>David Smart & Andrew Howard (1 July 2000) "Images of Sport - Castleford Rugby League - A Twentieth Century History". The History Press Ltd. {{ISBN|978-0752418957}}</ref><ref name="Castleford RLFC A to Z Player List (All Time)">{{cite web|url=http://www.thecastlefordtigers.co.uk/alltime.php|title=Castleford RLFC A to Z Player List (All Time)|publisher=thecastlefordtigers.co.uk |date=31 December 2013|accessdate=1 January 2014|url-status=dead|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20120216084010/http://www.thecastlefordtigers.co.uk/alltime.php|archivedate=February 16, 2012}}</ref><ref name="Statistics at thecastlefordtigers.co.uk">{{cite web|url=http://www.thecastlefordtigers.co.uk/playerprofile.php?pid=108|title=Statistics at thecastlefordtigers.co.uk|publisher=thecastlefordtigers.co.uk |date=31 December 2013|accessdate=1 January 2014|url-status=dead|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20120613032706/http://www.thecastlefordtigers.co.uk/playerprofile.php?pid=108|archivedate=June 13, 2012}}</ref> and coached at club level for the [[National Conference League]] (NCL) Eagles (assistant coach to [[Jamie Benn (rugby league)|Jamie Benn]]),<ref name="Benn to fly with the Eagles">{{cite web|url=http://www.nationalconferenceleague.co.uk/article/benn-to-fly-with-the.html |title=Benn to fly with the Eagles |publisher=nationalconferenceleague.co.uk |date=16 May 2011 |accessdate=16 May 2011 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20110514110938/http://www.nationalconferenceleague.co.uk/article/benn-to-fly-with-the.html |archivedate=14 May 2011 }}</ref> and [[Castleford Lock Lane|Lock Lane]] ARLFC with [[Francis Maloney (rugby league)|Francis Maloney]].

==Playing career==
===International honours===
Jason Flowers won 2 caps (plus 1 as substitute) for [[Scotland national rugby league team|Scotland]] in 1998–2001 while at Castleford.<ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/>

==Club career==
Jason Flowers was transferred from [[Redhill A.R.L.F.C.|Redhill]] [[Redhill ARLFC|ARLFC]] to [[Castleford Tigers|Castleford]] on Wednesday 12 May 1993.
